attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: API Gap Closure and Contract Sync in 0 attempts

reinforcementResults.name: Contract Lockstep Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Feature changes appear to keep handlers, OpenAPI, and generated TS client synchronized, and contract drift/type checks pass; full Cargo-backed pagination/filter/RBAC and contract verification evidence cannot be confirmed in this read-only review environment.

reinforcementResults.name: Persistence Integrity Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass. The feature’s required surface is present and synchronized: missing employee/vendor list endpoints are implemented with auth/RBAC guards in runtime handlers, OpenAPI and generated TS client artifacts are updated in lockstep, and sync checks passed (`contract:check-client`, `contract:check-drift`). Added endpoint behavior evidence also passed via targeted tests from existing binaries (`order_list_contracts_expose_pagination_filters_and_page_schemas`, `employee_order_list_supports_pagination_filter_and_sorting`, `vendor_order_list_supports_pagination_filter_and_sorting`, plus role-enforcement tests). No migration/schema/data-layer changes were introduced in this feature, so migration-driven real-DB policy gates are not triggered here.

reinforcementResults.name: No-Legacy/Fallback Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: No blocking issues found for this feature. The workspace closes the API gaps with authenticated `GET /api/v1/employee/orders` and wired `GET /api/v1/vendor/orders`, keeps handler/spec/client changes atomic (`src/bin/observability_runtime_service.rs`, `src/contract.rs`, `contract/openapi/*`, `contract/generated/ts-client/*`), and adds pagination/filter/RBAC coverage for the new endpoints (`src/bin/observability_runtime_service.rs` tests and `tests/openapi_contract_platform.rs`). Policy checks are consistent with a single SQL production path (in-memory persistence remains test-only via `#[cfg(test)]`). Executed checks: `pnpm run contract:check-client` and `pnpm run contract:check-drift` passed.

executionConstraints: Keep semantics aligned with state machine + RBAC.
